title: Cinematic Editorial Ink Road Movie Fashion Illustration AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Editorial Ink Road Movie Fashion Illustration AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic editorial ink illustration of adult woman with windblown shoulder-length hair in empty coastal road with distant cliffs and low clouds, looking back over the shoulder. Subject: adult woman with windblown shoulder-length hair keeps realistic proportions, windblown hair, sharp confident gaze, and long charcoal coat, cream scarf, and simple boots. Scene: empty coastal road with distant cliffs and low clouds becomes a realistic road-movie environment with weathered paper texture, ink splatters, distressed print marks, high-contrast shadows, and sunlit rim glow. Composition: 4:5 contemporary fashion poster illustration: over-the-shoulder look, wind direction visible in hair and clothing, loose expressive black ink linework, visible sketch construction lines, and cinematic negative space. Signature Elements: Preserved cinematic editorial ink road movie fashion illustration source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Fixed source details: Palette: charcoal black, warm cream, and muted ocean blue. Style: Loose editorial ink fashion illustration, contemporary road-movie poster mood, expressive black linework, realistic proportions, distressed print texture, and high-fashion illustration finish. Color Palette: Limited three-color palette: Loose expressive black ink linework, visible sketch construction lines, high-contrast shadows, sunlit rim glow, weathered paper texture, ink splatters, distressed print marks, realistic road-movie environment, limited, plus black ink linework and weathered paper texture. Lighting: Sunlit rim glow, high-contrast shadow blocks, paper-grain warmth, and dramatic illustrated depth around the figure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
